brandDescription: Maruti Suzuki is India's leading automotive manufacturer, known for reliable, fuel-efficient, and innovative vehicles. From the All-New Dzire that sets new benchmarks in the sedan segment with its 5-Star GNCAP safety rating, to the futuristic e VITARA electric SUV, and the premium Baleno hatchback, Maruti Suzuki continues to innovate with advanced technology, safety, and sustainability.

models.name: Dzire 1.2L Z-Series Petrol MT
models.description: The All-New Dzire — Where Style Meets Statement. Command attention on city streets or weekend getaways. Designed to go beyond expectations — and look brilliant doing it. Features include 6 Airbags, 5-Star GNCAP safety rating, and the future-ready 1.2L Z-Series Engine. Dimensions – 3,995 mm L x 1,735 mm W x 1,525 mm H. Wheelbase - 2,450 mm. Fuel tank capacity - 37 L. Boot Space - 382 L.

models.name: Dzire 1.2L Z-Series Petrol AMT
models.description: The All-New Dzire — Where Style Meets Statement. Enjoy a seamless driving experience with Auto Gear Shift (AGS) technology. Combining the convenience of automatic shifting with impressive fuel efficiency, the AGS delivers 25.71 km/l while ensuring smooth, responsive gear transitions. Features include 6 Airbags and 5-Star GNCAP safety rating.

models.name: e VITARA 49 kWh
models.description: The e VITARA comes equipped with a High Capacity Battery comprised of 120 lithium-ion based cells with an operating range from -30°C to 60°C. Designed from the ground up, the HEARTECT-e Platform blends performance, efficiency, and innovation. Experience electric performance from the future with the e VITARA. Features include ADAS Level 2, 7 Airbags, and Suzuki Connect.
